items.title: Zelensky presses Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
items.summary: The Ukrainian president says "decisions for air defence" should be "one of the key outcomes" of this week's summit in Turkey.

items.title: Ugandan Coffee Growers Shrug Off Drought Thanks to Regenerative Agriculture
items.summary: Among the rolling hills of Uganda’s Masaka region, robusta coffee plants are producing larger, tastier yields thanks to a pilot program utilizing regenerative agriculture to battle droughts or erratic…
